name: @concord/client
author: Concord

scripts.desktop:dev: concurrently -k -n vite,electron -c magenta,cyan "vite" "wait-on tcp:5173 && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5173 electron electron/main.cjs"
scripts.desktop:pack: npm run build && npm run build:electron && electron-builder --dir
scripts.desktop:build: npm run build && npm run build:electron && electron-builder

comment: All deps are build-time only: Vite bundles the renderer into dist/, so the packaged Electron app has zero runtime npm dependencies. This keeps electron-builder from running its (monorepo-destructive) production-dependency install step.
